title: Cobblemon Biome Expanded Spawns
description: A universal Cobblemon spawn datapack with exhaustive biome compatibility (vanilla + major biome mods) and curated presets for structures & underground.
body: # ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_35cf530a-aea6-4897-bedb-953a76c0249a.png) # 🌍 **Cobblemon Realms – Biome Expanded Spawns** Make your Cobblemon world feel truly alive. ✨ **Biome Expanded Spawns** is a large-scale Cobblemon spawn expansion datapack that massively improves where and how Pokemon appear across your world. With **1000+ spawn files**, **custom biome tags**, and **structure-aware spawn presets**, exploration becomes richer, more immersive, and far more rewarding. No more bland encounters. No more biomes that feel empty. Just a world where Pokemon appear in places that make sense. 🧭 *** ## ✨ **What It Adds** * 🌿 **Massively expanded biome coverage** * 🗺️ **Custom biome categories** for more accurate spawn logic * 🏰 **Structure-based spawns** for special locations * 🐉 **Support for all existing Cobblemon species** * 💎 **Cobblemon Realms exclusive/custom spawns included** * ⚡ **Plug-and-play datapack**, easy to install and use Every zone feels more distinct, more believable, and more exciting to explore. *** ## 🧩 **Built For Varied Worlds** This datapack doesn't just touch vanilla biomes. It also includes compatibility with popular mods such as: * **Oh The Biomes You’ll Go** * **Oh The Biomes We've Gone** * **Biomes O’ Plenty** * **Terralith** * **Regions Unexplored** * **Wythers** * **Nullscape** * **Incendium** * **Still Life** * **YUNG’s structure mods** * **Ends Phantasm** *** ## 🏰 **More Than Biomes** Spawns are also adapted to structures and special environments. That means Pokemon can appear in locations tied to exploration and atmosphere, such as: * **Ancient Cities** * **Strongholds** * **Woodland Mansions** * **Ocean Monuments** * **Ocean Ruins** * **Ruined Portals** * **Pillager Outposts** * **Desert Pyramids** * **Jungle Temples** * **End Cities** * and other custom or modded structures This gives each adventure a stronger identity and makes rare encounters feel much more memorable. 🔥 *** ## 🛠️ **Installation** 1. Download the `.zip` from the **Files** tab 2. Place it in your solo world or world server's `datapacks/` folder 3. Use `/reload` or restart the world Simple, fast, and ready to go. *** ## 💡 **Why Use It** **Biome Expanded Spawns** is made to give your Cobblemon experience more depth, more variety, and more personality. Whether you play on a solo survival world or a large multiplayer server, it helps turn exploration into something that constantly feels fresh. If your world has lots of biome diversity, custom generation, or special Cobblemon content, this datapack helps everything feel connected naturally. 🌟 *** ## 💬 **Feedback & Suggestions** Want to suggest a biome mod, report a weird spawn, or share ideas? Join the community here: 👉 [https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n](https://discord.gg/kb8NSTF45n) *** ## 🤝 **Partner** This project is proudly partnered with **BisectHosting** 💙 Need a reliable server for your Cobblemon world? Use code **OURSTORY** for **25% off your first month**: 👉 [https://bisecthosting.com/ourstory](https://bisecthosting.com/ourstory) *** ## 💖 **Support The Project** If you enjoy our work and want to help support future content, consider joining us on **Patreon**. You'll help us create more updates, more custom content, and even bigger projects for the community: 👉 [https://www.patreon.com/c/OurStoryCollection](https://www.patreon.com/c/OurStoryCollection)
